ItacPersonItem.Notes: Bedori was also member of the Inabili (Bologna), Arcadi (Rome, with the name Fabillo Giunonio), was among the founders of the Colonia Renia, and was part of the Accademia Clementina.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
